versions.changelog:
## What's New

- Add Playback mode (Auto / Prefer Direct Play / Direct Play Only) and True Direct Play browse URLs
- Add Modern Android device profile with expanded Direct Play containers and MIME types
- Add debounced index rebuild coordinator and server load guard for safer prewarm defaults
- Fix index-time StreamBuilder debug log floods using lightweight Direct Play heuristic
- Fix DLNA capability probe URLs and early transcode guards to avoid transcode lock errors
- Refresh embedded system device profiles when plugin content changes

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json

## What's New

- Add collapsible advanced settings for JSON presets and title-strip regex fields
- Fix summary browse parentID for virtual folders (mixed library playback)
- Add MusicVideo playback URLs in summary browse responses
- Index home videos (Video/Photo) and music videos (MusicVideo)
- Add hybrid summary/DTO loading when index coverage is partial
- Bump browse cache schema version to invalidate stale L1 responses

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json

## What's New

- Replace kana-row classification with preset-based title browse (alphabet / japanese-kana)
- Add library-specific regex overrides for title prefix stripping
- Add HideEmptyVirtualFolders to hide empty virtual browse folders
- Fix Non-Quest playback URL query parameter (?dlnaheaders=true)
- Extend Browse settings UI with preset selection and config loading fixes

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json

## What's New

- Fork release with GitHub Pages plugin repository and automated CI/CD publishing
- Fix Meta Quest 3 DLNA playback when indexed browse omits stream URLs
- Add episode list image source setting and improve startup index UI
- Fix DLNA Browse cache reliability and restore thumbnail performance
- Reorganize DLNA settings UI into tabbed layout with clearer help text
- Add DLNA browse poster/thumbnail display for virtual folder lists
- Add virtual folders for mixed, home videos, and music video libraries
- Add SQLite virtual folder indexes and layered browse caches for performance
- Add Browse By Kana classification, paging settings, and Quest compatibility mode
- Add 3D, 4K, 8K, and VR video support
- Pin Jellyfin API packages to 10.11.10 for Jellyfin 10.11.x compatibility

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json
